name: crm
description: Personal CRM skill — manage deals, log activity, draft follow-ups

commands.name: /deal
commands.description: /deal <name> — show deal details and activity history

commands.name: /log
commands.description: /log <deal name> — log activity using natural language

commands.name: /move
commands.description: /move <deal name> — advance deal to next stage

commands.name: /lost
commands.description: /lost <deal name> — mark deal as lost (asks for reason)
